headerDisplay: Exposes Hive heating zones and hot water to HomeKit via the Hive cloud API. **First-time setup with 2FA:** enter your username and password and restart. If your account uses SMS two-factor authentication, check the Homebridge log — you'll be prompted to enter the SMS code in the **2FA Code** field below, then restart once more. After that the field can be left blank.
footerDisplay: For help and issues see the project's GitHub repository.

username.title: Hive Username (email)
username.description: The email address you use to sign in to Hive. Must be the account owner.

smsCode.title: 2FA Code (first-time setup only)
smsCode.description: Only needed during initial pairing if your account has SMS two-factor authentication. Enter the code from the text message, restart, then clear this field.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh device state from Hive. Minimum 15 seconds to avoid hammering the API. Changes you make from Home are also confirmed by a quick refresh a few seconds after each command.

hotWaterDurationMinutes.title: Hot Water Boost Duration
hotWaterDurationMinutes.description: How long hot water runs when its switch is turned on, then it reverts to its schedule.

enableMatter.title: Enable Matter Accessories
enableMatter.description: When Homebridge v2 Matter is enabled for this bridge, also expose Hive heating and hot water as Matter accessories.

_bridge.title: Child Bridge
_bridge.description: Homebridge child bridge settings. Use bind to restrict HomeKit and Matter mDNS to a specific interface or IP address.

bind.title: Network Interface
bind.description: Bind this child bridge, including Matter mDNS, to a specific interface name or IP address such as eth0, wlan0, or 192.168.1.10.
